Subject: Inquiry Regarding Picnic Area Availability

Dear Public Park Office,

I am writing to ask about securing a reservation for a group picnic at your facility. Our team is interested in organizing an event for approximately twenty people. Could you please provide details on available dates, rental fees, and any specific guidelines regarding waste disposal or equipment usage?

We would appreciate information on the permit process as well. Thank you for your assistance.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number]

Looking forward to your response.<|im_end|>

Subject: Inquiry Regarding Picnic Area Availability

Dear Public Park Office,

I am writing to ask about securing a reservation for a group picnic at your facility. Our team is interested in organizing an event for approximately twenty people. Could you please provide details on available dates, rental fees, and any specific guidelines regarding waste disposal or equipment usage?

We would appreciate information on the permit process as well. Thank you for your assistance.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number]

Looking forward to your response.<|im_end|>
